pkgmetadata.longdescription: Welcome to ibm-watson-machine-learningibm-watson-machine-learning is a library that allows to work with Watson Machine Learning service on [IBM Cloud](httpsconsole.bluemix.netcatalogservicesmachine-learning) andIBM Cloud for Data. Train, test and deploy your models as APIs for application development, share with colleagues using this python library. [Package Sphinx documentation](httpibm-wml-api-pyclient.mybluemix.net)
